checks.name: README release files
checks.summary: Checked README, version, changelog, hero image, hero notes, and README model evidence files.

checks.name: English-first Chinese mirror
checks.summary: Checked the README language note, Chinese mirror section, paired headings, order, and mirror length.

checks.name: Text-to-image hero evidence
checks.summary: Checked hero block count, renderable raster asset size, prompt evidence, design note, and deterministic-hero exclusions.

checks.name: README model evidence
checks.summary: Checked for a recorded LogicGuard-backed capability model with mechanism, evidence, boundary, and objection coverage.

checks.name: Version consistency
checks.summary: Checked VERSION, pyproject.toml, README current release line, and CHANGELOG entry.

checks.name: Command surface and public boundary
checks.summary: Checked README command surface wording and scanned public-facing README release files for private paths and unsafe overclaims.

claim_boundary: This README release gate checks the current local README, version files, hero evidence, model evidence, command-surface wording, and public-safety scans. It does not prove package publication, GitHub release creation, external links beyond local path checks, or future AI behavior.

evidence.summary: Checked text-to-image hero prompt, design note, README hero block, and raster asset.

residual_risk: This local command does not provide fixture coverage, suite automation, package publication, or code-contract validation.
